---
title: "RCT_outcome_reproducibility_expansion"
author: "Codex"
date: "2026-06-08"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(lmerTest)
library(emmeans)
```

# Purpose

This workflow checks whether the cleaned expansion datasets reproduce outcome
summary statistics reported in the associated primary publications. It audits the
active expansion trials in `rct_expansion/cleaned_data` and the archived backup
trials under `rct_expansion/backup`.

```{r helpers}
root = "rct_expansion"
clean_dir = file.path(root, "cleaned_data")
backup_dir = file.path(root, "backup")
prov_dir = file.path(root, "provenance")
dir.create(prov_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

trial_path = function(id) {
  id = as.character(id)
  active = file.path(clean_dir, paste0("trial", id, ".rds"))
  backup = file.path(backup_dir, id, "cleaned_data", paste0(id, ".rds"))
  if (file.exists(active)) return(active)
  if (file.exists(backup)) return(backup)
  NA_character_
}

read_trial = function(id) {
  path = trial_path(id)
  if (is.na(path)) return(NULL)
  read_rds(path)
}

stat_value = function(x, statistic) {
  x = x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  x_num = suppressWarnings(readr::parse_number(as.character(x)))
  switch(
    statistic,
    mean = mean(x),
    sd = sd(x),
    median = median(x),
    q1 = as.numeric(quantile(x, 0.25, names = FALSE, type = 7)),
    q3 = as.numeric(quantile(x, 0.75, names = FALSE, type = 7)),
    count = length(x),
    sum = sum(x_num, na.rm = TRUE),
    NA_real_
  )
}

value_by_arm = function(id, outcome_variable, arm, statistic) {
  d = read_trial(id)
  if (is.null(d) || !outcome_variable %in% names(d)) return(NA_real_)
  stat_value(d[[outcome_variable]][d$Treatment == arm], statistic)
}

derived_value_by_arm = function(id, expr_name, arm, statistic) {
  d = read_trial(id)
  if (is.null(d)) return(NA_real_)
  col = function(name) {
    if (name %in% names(d)) return(d[[name]])
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(d))
  }
  d = d %>%
    mutate(
      trial51_hooper_sleep_post = col("X_sleep_quality_0w") + col("YS_delta_subjective_sleep_quality_post"),
      trial52_serum_phosphorus_23w = col("X_serum_phosphorus_0w") + col("YP_delta_serum_phosphorus_23w"),
      trial52_bsfs_7w = col("X_bsfs_0w") + col("YP_delta_bsfs_7w"),
      B04_sis_post = col("X_disability_sis_0w") + col("YP_delta_disability_sis_post"),
      B04_sis_followup = col("X_disability_sis_0w") + col("YP_delta_disability_sis_followup"),
      B04_whodas_post = col("X_quality_whodas_0w") + col("YP_delta_quality_whodas_post"),
      B04_whodas_followup = col("X_quality_whodas_0w") + col("YP_delta_quality_whodas_followup")
    )
  if (!expr_name %in% names(d)) return(NA_real_)
  stat_value(d[[expr_name]][d$Treatment == arm], statistic)
}

percent_by_arm = function(id, expr_name, arm, predicate) {
  d = read_trial(id)
  if (is.null(d)) return(NA_real_)
  col = function(name) {
    if (name %in% names(d)) return(d[[name]])
    rep(NA_real_, nrow(d))
  }
  d = d %>%
    mutate(
      trial52_bsfs_7w = col("X_bsfs_0w") + col("YP_delta_bsfs_7w")
    )
  if (!expr_name %in% names(d)) return(NA_real_)
  x = d[[expr_name]][d$Treatment == arm]
  x = x[!is.na(x)]
  if (length(x) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  100 * mean(predicate(x))
}

rate_by_arm = function(id, numerator, denominator_days, arm) {
  d = read_trial(id)
  if (is.null(d) || !all(c(numerator, denominator_days) %in% names(d))) return(NA_real_)
  dd = d[d$Treatment == arm, ]
  sum(dd[[numerator]], na.rm = TRUE) / (sum(dd[[denominator_days]], na.rm = TRUE) / 365.25)
}

trial57_weight_loss_difference = function(time_label) {
  d = read_trial(57)
  if (is.null(d)) return(NA_real_)
  long = d %>%
    mutate(person = row_number()) %>%
    transmute(
      person,
      Treatment,
      kg_base_raw = X_weight_0m,
      bmi_base_raw = X_bmi_0m,
      `Month 6` = X_weight_0m - YP_weight_loss_6m,
      `Month 12` = X_weight_0m - YP_weight_loss_12m
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(c(`Month 6`, `Month 12`), names_to = "time", values_to = "kg") %>%
    filter(!is.na(kg), !is.na(kg_base_raw), !is.na(bmi_base_raw)) %>%
    mutate(
      kg_base = as.numeric(scale(kg_base_raw, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)),
      bmi_base = as.numeric(scale(bmi_base_raw, center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)),
      time = factor(time, levels = c("Month 6", "Month 12")),
      Treatment = factor(Treatment, levels = c("Motivational interviewing", "Functional imagery training"))
    )
  if (nrow(long) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  m = lmer(kg ~ kg_base + bmi_base * time * Treatment + (1 | person), data = long)
  contrast_tbl = emmeans(m, pairwise ~ Treatment | time, adjust = "none")$contrasts %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(weight_loss_difference = estimate)
  contrast_tbl$weight_loss_difference[contrast_tbl$time == time_label][1]
}

trial62_ckdepi_difference_24m = function() {
  d = read_trial(62)
  if (is.null(d)) return(NA_real_)
  long = d %>%
    mutate(person = row_number()) %>%
    transmute(
      person,
      Treatment,
      X_ckdepi_0m,
      `Month 3` = YS_ckdepi_3m,
      `Month 12` = YS_ckdepi_12m,
      `Month 24` = YP_ckdepi_24m
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(c(`Month 3`, `Month 12`, `Month 24`), names_to = "time", values_to = "egfr") %>%
    filter(!is.na(egfr), !is.na(X_ckdepi_0m)) %>%
    mutate(
      time = factor(time, levels = c("Month 3", "Month 12", "Month 24")),
      Treatment = factor(Treatment, levels = c("Cyclosporine", "Tacrolimus"))
    )
  if (nrow(long) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  m = lmer(egfr ~ X_ckdepi_0m + Treatment * time + (1 | person), data = long, REML = FALSE)
  contrast_tbl = emmeans(m, pairwise ~ Treatment | time, adjust = "none")$contrasts %>%
    as_tibble()
  contrast_tbl$estimate[contrast_tbl$time == "Month 24"][1]
}

mean_difference_by_arm = function(id, outcome_variable, arm_a, arm_b) {
  d = read_trial(id)
  if (is.null(d) || !outcome_variable %in% names(d)) return(NA_real_)
  mean(d[[outcome_variable]][d$Treatment == arm_a], na.rm = TRUE) -
    mean(d[[outcome_variable]][d$Treatment == arm_b], na.rm = TRUE)
}

paired_t_baseline_minus_post = function(id, baseline_variable, outcome_variable, arm) {
  d = read_trial(id)
  if (is.null(d) || !all(c(baseline_variable, outcome_variable) %in% names(d))) return(NA_real_)
  dd = d %>%
    filter(Treatment == arm, !is.na(.data[[baseline_variable]]), !is.na(.data[[outcome_variable]]))
  if (nrow(dd) < 2) return(NA_real_)
  unname(t.test(dd[[baseline_variable]], dd[[outcome_variable]], paired = TRUE)$statistic)
}

group_curve_peak = function(id, outcome_variable, arm, period_label) {
  d = read_trial(id)
  if (is.null(d) || !"X_period_label" %in% names(d)) return(NA_real_)
  if (all(c(outcome_variable, "X_time_seconds") %in% names(d))) {
    return(
      d %>%
        filter(Treatment == arm, X_period_label == period_label) %>%
        group_by(X_time_seconds) %>%
        summarise(value = mean(.data[[outcome_variable]], na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
        summarise(peak = max(value, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
        pull(peak)
    )
  }
  prefix = case_when(
    outcome_variable %in% c("YP_evas_without_conditioning", "YP_peak_evas_without_conditioning") ~ "YS_evas_without_conditioning_t",
    outcome_variable %in% c("YP_evas_with_conditioning", "YP_peak_evas_with_conditioning") ~ "YS_evas_with_conditioning_t",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
  if (is.na(prefix)) return(NA_real_)
  curve_cols = names(d)[startsWith(names(d), prefix)]
  if (length(curve_cols) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  dd = d %>% filter(Treatment == arm, X_period_label == period_label)
  if (nrow(dd) == 0) return(NA_real_)
  max(map_dbl(curve_cols, ~ mean(dd[[.x]], na.rm = TRUE)), na.rm = TRUE)
}

row_key = c("Trial_ID", "outcome_variable", "outcome_role", "arm", "statistic")

targets = tribble(
  ~Trial_ID, ~outcome_variable, ~outcome_role, ~arm, ~statistic, ~paper_value, ~paper_precision, ~paper_source, ~notes,
  "51", "YP_sleep_latency_7d", "primary", "Control", "mean", 1.91, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep latency, minutes.",
  "51", "YP_sleep_latency_7d", "primary", "Control", "sd", 0.98, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep latency, minutes.",
  "51", "YP_sleep_latency_7d", "primary", "Sleep hygiene", "mean", 0.72, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep latency, minutes.",
  "51", "YP_sleep_latency_7d", "primary", "Sleep hygiene", "sd", 0.15, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep latency, minutes.",
  "51", "YP_sleep_latency_7d", "primary", "Lavender oil", "mean", 1.34, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep latency, minutes.",
  "51", "YP_sleep_latency_7d", "primary", "Lavender oil", "sd", 0.40, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep latency, minutes.",
  "51", "YP_sleep_latency_7d", "primary", "Sleep hygiene + lavender oil", "mean", 0.98, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep latency, minutes.",
  "51", "YP_sleep_latency_7d", "primary", "Sleep hygiene + lavender oil", "sd", 0.45, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep latency, minutes.",
  "51", "YS_sleep_efficiency_7d", "secondary", "Control", "mean", 87.27, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep efficiency, percent.",
  "51", "YS_sleep_efficiency_7d", "secondary", "Control", "sd", 5.02, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep efficiency, percent.",
  "51", "YS_sleep_efficiency_7d", "secondary", "Sleep hygiene", "mean", 89.57, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep efficiency, percent.",
  "51", "YS_sleep_efficiency_7d", "secondary", "Sleep hygiene", "sd", 3.03, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep efficiency, percent.",
  "51", "YS_sleep_efficiency_7d", "secondary", "Lavender oil", "mean", 85.88, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep efficiency, percent.",
  "51", "YS_sleep_efficiency_7d", "secondary", "Lavender oil", "sd", 3.98, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep efficiency, percent.",
  "51", "YS_sleep_efficiency_7d", "secondary", "Sleep hygiene + lavender oil", "mean", 86.93, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep efficiency, percent.",
  "51", "YS_sleep_efficiency_7d", "secondary", "Sleep hygiene + lavender oil", "sd", 4.80, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 2", "Sleep efficiency, percent.",
  "51", "X_sleep_quality_0w", "secondary_baseline", "Control", "mean", 4.09, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 3", "Hooper sleep pre-intervention.",
  "51", "trial51_hooper_sleep_post", "secondary", "Control", "mean", 4.55, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 3", "Hooper sleep post-intervention.",
  "51", "X_sleep_quality_0w", "secondary_baseline", "Sleep hygiene", "mean", 4.13, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 3", "Hooper sleep pre-intervention.",
  "51", "trial51_hooper_sleep_post", "secondary", "Sleep hygiene", "mean", 2.38, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 3", "Hooper sleep post-intervention.",
  "51", "X_sleep_quality_0w", "secondary_baseline", "Lavender oil", "mean", 4.56, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 3", "Hooper sleep pre-intervention.",
  "51", "trial51_hooper_sleep_post", "secondary", "Lavender oil", "mean", 3.33, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 3", "Hooper sleep post-intervention.",
  "51", "X_sleep_quality_0w", "secondary_baseline", "Sleep hygiene + lavender oil", "mean", 4.33, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 3", "Hooper sleep pre-intervention.",
  "51", "trial51_hooper_sleep_post", "secondary", "Sleep hygiene + lavender oil", "mean", 2.11, 0.01, "Trial51 Table 3", "Hooper sleep post-intervention.",
  "52", "X_serum_phosphorus_0w", "primary_baseline", "Tenapanor", "mean", 5.17, 0.01, "Trial52 text near Fig 4", "Serum phosphorus baseline.",
  "52", "X_serum_phosphorus_0w", "primary_baseline", "Control", "mean", 5.06, 0.01, "Trial52 text near Fig 4", "Serum phosphorus baseline.",
  "52", "trial52_serum_phosphorus_23w", "primary", "Tenapanor", "mean", 4.11, 0.01, "Trial52 text near Fig 4", "Serum phosphorus week 23.",
  "52", "trial52_serum_phosphorus_23w", "primary", "Control", "mean", 4.76, 0.01, "Trial52 text near Fig 4", "Serum phosphorus week 23.",
  "52", "trial52_bsfs_7w", "primary", "Tenapanor", "percent_type_1_2", 0.00, 0.01, "Trial52 BSFS results text", "Hard stools resolved by the end of the medication trial.",
  "53", "YP_total_sufentanil_perioperative", "primary", "Group 1", "mean", 155.41, 0.01, "Trial53 Table 1", "Total perioperative cumulative sufentanil.",
  "53", "YP_total_sufentanil_perioperative", "primary", "Group 1", "sd", 19.58, 0.01, "Trial53 Table 1", "Total perioperative cumulative sufentanil.",
  "53", "YP_total_sufentanil_perioperative", "primary", "Group 2", "mean", 119.37, 0.01, "Trial53 Table 1", "Total perioperative cumulative sufentanil.",
  "53", "YP_total_sufentanil_perioperative", "primary", "Group 2", "sd", 12.41, 0.01, "Trial53 Table 1", "Total perioperative cumulative sufentanil.",
  "53", "YS_rescue_analgesia", "secondary", "Group 1", "sum", 25, 1, "Trial53 Table 1", "Rescue analgesia count.",
  "53", "YS_rescue_analgesia", "secondary", "Group 2", "sum", 16, 1, "Trial53 Table 1", "Rescue analgesia count.",
  "53", "YS_qor40", "secondary", "Group 1", "mean", 166.45, 0.01, "Trial53 Table 1", "QoR-40 score.",
  "53", "YS_qor40", "secondary", "Group 2", "mean", 166.53, 0.01, "Trial53 Table 1", "QoR-40 score.",
  "54", "YP_fsfi_total_v5", "primary", "Pelvic floor training", "mean", 18.35, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 3", "FSFI total at end of treatment.",
  "54", "YP_fsfi_total_v5", "primary", "Pelvic floor training", "sd", 5.47, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 3", "FSFI total at end of treatment.",
  "54", "YP_fsfi_total_v5", "primary", "Vaginal spheres + pelvic floor training", "mean", 19.00, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 3", "FSFI total at end of treatment.",
  "54", "YP_fsfi_total_v5", "primary", "Vaginal spheres + pelvic floor training", "sd", 7.10, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 3", "FSFI total at end of treatment.",
  "54", "X_fsfi_total_0m", "primary_baseline", "Pelvic floor training", "mean", 18.06, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 1", "FSFI total baseline.",
  "54", "X_fsfi_total_0m", "primary_baseline", "Vaginal spheres + pelvic floor training", "mean", 19.08, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 1", "FSFI total baseline.",
  "54", "YS_iciq_sf_v5", "secondary", "Pelvic floor training", "mean", 4.52, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 3", "ICIQ-UI-SF at end of treatment.",
  "54", "YS_iciq_sf_v5", "secondary", "Vaginal spheres + pelvic floor training", "mean", 3.31, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 3", "ICIQ-UI-SF at end of treatment.",
  "54", "YS_oxford_power_v5", "secondary", "Pelvic floor training", "mean", 2.93, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 3", "Oxford power at end of treatment.",
  "54", "YS_oxford_power_v5", "secondary", "Vaginal spheres + pelvic floor training", "mean", 2.96, 0.01, "Trial54 Table 3", "Oxford power at end of treatment.",
  "55", "YP_total_moderate_serious_aecopd_12m", "primary", "Control", "mean", 3.00, 0.01, "Trial55 Table 2", "Total moderate/severe AECOPD count.",
  "55", "YP_total_moderate_serious_aecopd_12m", "primary", "Control", "sd", 3.02, 0.01, "Trial55 Table 2", "Total moderate/severe AECOPD count.",
  "55", "YP_total_moderate_serious_aecopd_12m", "primary", "Control", "sum", 84, 1, "Trial55 results text", "Total moderate/severe AECOPD events.",
  "55", "YP_total_moderate_serious_aecopd_12m", "primary", "Taking Charge", "mean", 3.04, 0.01, "Trial55 Table 2", "Total moderate/severe AECOPD count.",
  "55", "YP_total_moderate_serious_aecopd_12m", "primary", "Taking Charge", "sd", 2.59, 0.01, "Trial55 Table 2", "Total moderate/severe AECOPD count.",
  "55", "YP_total_moderate_serious_aecopd_12m", "primary", "Taking Charge", "sum", 85, 1, "Trial55 results text", "Total moderate/severe AECOPD events.",
  "56", "YP_attention_rbans_post", "primary", "Sham tDCS", "mean", 106.00, 0.01, "Trial56 underlying data and primary attention results", "RBANS Attention Index after 3-week treatment.",
  "56", "YP_attention_rbans_post", "primary", "Active tDCS", "mean", 123.00, 0.01, "Trial56 underlying data and primary attention results", "RBANS Attention Index after 3-week treatment.",
  "56", "X_attention_rbans_0w", "primary_baseline", "Sham tDCS", "mean", 103.43, 0.01, "Trial56 underlying data and Table 2", "Baseline RBANS Attention Index.",
  "56", "X_attention_rbans_0w", "primary_baseline", "Active tDCS", "mean", 105.88, 0.01, "Trial56 underlying data and Table 2", "Baseline RBANS Attention Index.",
  "57", "YP_weight_loss_12m", "primary", "Functional imagery training vs Motivational interviewing", "model_difference_12m", 5.77, 0.01, "Trial57 abstract/results", "Model-estimated 12-month weight-loss mean difference between FIT and MI.",
  "57", "YP_weight_loss_12m", "primary", "Functional imagery training", "mean", 7.43, 0.01, "Trial57 data supplement raw descriptives", "Observed 12-month weight loss in participants with follow-up data.",
  "57", "YP_weight_loss_12m", "primary", "Motivational interviewing", "mean", 1.40, 0.01, "Trial57 data supplement raw descriptives", "Observed 12-month weight loss in participants with follow-up data.",
  "58", "YP_rbans_total_1w", "primary", "Sham tDCS + cognitive training", "mean", 89.13, 0.01, "Trial58 Table 2", "RBANS Total Score at one-week endpoint.",
  "58", "YP_rbans_total_1w", "primary", "Active tDCS + cognitive training", "mean", 88.14, 0.01, "Trial58 Table 2", "RBANS Total Score at one-week endpoint.",
  "58", "X_rbans_total_0w", "primary_baseline", "Sham tDCS + cognitive training", "mean", 85.80, 0.01, "Trial58 Table 2", "Baseline RBANS Total Score.",
  "58", "X_rbans_total_0w", "primary_baseline", "Active tDCS + cognitive training", "mean", 82.36, 0.01, "Trial58 Table 2", "Baseline RBANS Total Score.",
  "59", "YP_dorsiflexion_dominant_post", "primary", "Static stretching", "mean", 8.54, 0.01, "Trial59 Table 3/Fig 5", "Dominant-leg dorsiflexion ROM immediately post-intervention.",
  "59", "YP_dorsiflexion_dominant_post", "primary", "Tissue flossing", "mean", 10.02, 0.01, "Trial59 Table 3/Fig 5", "Dominant-leg dorsiflexion ROM immediately post-intervention.",
  "59", "X_dorsiflexion_dominant_0d", "primary_baseline", "Static stretching", "mean", 8.16, 0.01, "Trial59 Table 3/Fig 5", "Baseline dominant-leg dorsiflexion ROM.",
  "59", "X_dorsiflexion_dominant_0d", "primary_baseline", "Tissue flossing", "mean", 7.71, 0.01, "Trial59 Table 3/Fig 5", "Baseline dominant-leg dorsiflexion ROM.",
  "60", "YP_delta_glucose_elution_post", "primary", "Sham", "mean", -19.8, 0.1, "Trial60 abstract/results", "Within-period glucose elution change after sham.",
  "60", "YP_delta_glucose_elution_post", "primary", "IW stimulation", "mean", 31.5, 0.1, "Trial60 abstract/results", "Within-period glucose elution change after IW stimulation.",
  "60", "X_glucose_elution_pre", "primary_baseline", "Sham", "mean", 263.0, 0.1, "Trial60 discussion/results", "Pre-period glucose elution concentration before sham.",
  "60", "YP_glucose_elution_post", "primary", "IW stimulation", "mean", 288.0, 0.1, "Trial60 discussion/results", "Post-period glucose elution concentration after IW stimulation.",
  "61", "YP_delta_fasting_glucose_4m", "primary", "Supplement", "mean", -0.24, 0.01, "Trial61 abstract/results", "Four-month fasting plasma glucose change in the supplement arm.",
  "62", "YP_ckdepi_24m", "primary", "Cyclosporine vs Tacrolimus", "model_difference_24m_csa_minus_tac", -4.48, 0.01, "Trial62 abstract/results", "Model-estimated CKD-EPI difference at 24 months, cyclosporine minus tacrolimus.",
  "63", "YP_delta_peak_vo2_post", "primary", "HIIT", "mean", 2.1, 0.1, "Trial63 abstract/results", "Peak VO2 change after HIIT.",
  "64", "YP_delta_pain_vas_5m", "primary", "Exercise minus control", "mean_difference_change_exercise_vs_control", -0.74, 0.01, "Trial64 abstract/results", "Exercise-minus-control low-back-pain VAS change difference.",
  "65", "YP_time_to_exhaustion_min", "primary", "Active tDCS", "mean", 12.3, 0.1, "Trial65 results table", "Time to exhaustion in minutes during active tDCS.",
  "66", "YP_foam_eo_mtv_post", "primary", "Ashtanga yoga therapy", "paired_t_baseline_minus_post", -3.66, 0.01, "Trial66 results text", "Paired t statistic for baseline minus post foam eyes-open mean total velocity in the yoga arm.",
  "67", "YP_beta2_microglobulin_clearance_mean", "primary", "High cut-off filter", "mean", 19.6, 0.1, "Trial67 abstract/results", "Mean beta2-microglobulin clearance in the high cut-off filter arm.",
  "68", "YP_delta_clinician_adhd_inattentive_8w", "primary", "BCI attention training", "mean", 3.46, 0.01, "Trial68 results table", "Clinician-rated inattentive symptom improvement from week 1 to week 8.",
  "69", "YP_peak_evas_without_conditioning", "primary", "Placebo", "group_curve_peak_without_cs_60_90", 53.0, 0.1, "Trial69 results/Figure 1", "Peak of the placebo 60-90 minute group-mean eVAS curve without conditioning stimulus.",
  "70", "YP_grand_index_delta", "primary", "Lumosity cognitive training", "mean", 5.24, 0.01, "Trial70 results text", "Grand Index change in the Lumosity cognitive training arm.",
  "71", "YP_preterm_or_low_birth_weight", "primary", "Intervention", "sum", 27, 1, "Trial71 article results table", "Composite preterm birth or low birth weight event count in intervention arm.",
  "72", "YP_active_bleeding_controlled_20min", "primary", "Sublingual misoprostol", "sum", 440, 1, "Trial72 Lancet results", "Active bleeding controlled within 20 minutes in Study A misoprostol arm.",
  "73", "YP_call_service_satisfaction_likert", "primary", "AI-assisted reassurance call", "mean", 4.20, 0.01, "Trial73 article abstract/results", "Likert satisfaction with the reassurance-call service in the AI-assisted arm.",
  "74", "YP_delta_sara_post", "primary", "Core stability exercise", "mean", -1.64, 0.01, "Trial74 article results table", "SARA total score change after intervention in the exercise arm.",
  "75", "YP_delta_nrs_3m", "primary", "Reduced two-branch RFA", "mean", -4.12, 0.01, "Trial75 article results table", "Three-month NRS pain change in reduced-branch RFA arm.",
  "76", "YP_total_score_after_training", "primary", "Time-segmented-target teaching", "mean", 82.3, 0.1, "Trial76 article results table", "Post-training spinal puncture total performance score.",
  "77", "YP_delta_trunk_impairment_t2", "primary", "Core stability exercise", "mean", 8.75, 0.01, "Trial77 article results table", "T2 Trunk Impairment Scale change in CORE arm.",
  "78", "YP_disease_progression_28d", "primary", "Regional thermotherapy", "sum", 14, 1, "Trial78 article results table", "Any COVID-19 disease progression by 28 days.",
  "79", "YP_knowledge_post", "primary", "Webtoon education", "mean", 21.0, 0.1, "Trial79 article results table", "Immediate posteducation knowledge score in webtoon education arm.",
  "80", "YP_delta_bmi_6m", "primary", "Digital peer support", "mean", -0.38, 0.01, "Trial80 article results table", "Six-month BMI change in digital peer-support arm.",
  "B01", "YP_delta_kmpai_pre3", "primary", "Control", "mean", NA_real_, NA_real_, "B01 paper", "No exact post/change K-MPAI summary was reported for the cleaned primary outcome.",
  "B02", "YP_malaria_events", "primary", "DP every 12 weeks", "rate_per_person_year", 0.322, 0.001, "B02 results text", "Malaria incidence per person-year after correcting raw event code.",
  "B02", "YP_malaria_events", "primary", "DP every 4 weeks", "rate_per_person_year", 0.017, 0.001, "B02 results text", "Malaria incidence per person-year after correcting raw event code.",
  "B03", "published_sputum_bacterial_load", "primary", "Placebo", "mean_change", NA_real_, NA_real_, "B03 Table 2", "Published primary raw variable is not available in public source files.",
  "B04", "X_disability_sis_0w", "primary_baseline", "Intervention", "mean", 49.75, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "SIS total baseline.",
  "B04", "B04_sis_post", "primary", "Intervention", "mean", 69.04, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "SIS total post-intervention.",
  "B04", "B04_sis_followup", "primary", "Intervention", "mean", 70.60, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "SIS total follow-up.",
  "B04", "X_disability_sis_0w", "primary_baseline", "Control", "mean", 47.53, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "SIS total baseline.",
  "B04", "B04_sis_post", "primary", "Control", "mean", 58.10, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "SIS total post-intervention.",
  "B04", "B04_sis_followup", "primary", "Control", "mean", 58.82, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "SIS total follow-up.",
  "B04", "X_quality_whodas_0w", "primary_baseline", "Intervention", "mean", 40.42, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "WHODAS total baseline.",
  "B04", "B04_whodas_post", "primary", "Intervention", "mean", 50.95, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "WHODAS total post-intervention.",
  "B04", "B04_whodas_followup", "primary", "Intervention", "mean", 52.62, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "WHODAS total follow-up.",
  "B04", "X_quality_whodas_0w", "primary_baseline", "Control", "mean", 37.74, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "WHODAS total baseline.",
  "B04", "B04_whodas_post", "primary", "Control", "mean", 46.51, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "WHODAS total post-intervention.",
  "B04", "B04_whodas_followup", "primary", "Control", "mean", 47.29, 0.01, "B04 Table II", "WHODAS total follow-up.",
  "B05", "no_publication_identified", "primary", NA_character_, "mean", NA_real_, NA_real_, "B05 search record", "No associated main publication was identified."
)
```

```{r compute-audit}
computed = targets %>%
  mutate(
    cleaned_value = pmap_dbl(
      list(Trial_ID, outcome_variable, arm, statistic),
      function(Trial_ID, outcome_variable, arm, statistic) {
        if (statistic == "percent_type_1_2") {
          return(percent_by_arm(Trial_ID, outcome_variable, arm, function(x) x %in% c(1, 2)))
        }
        if (statistic == "model_difference_12m") {
          return(trial57_weight_loss_difference("Month 12"))
        }
        if (statistic == "model_difference_24m_csa_minus_tac") {
          return(trial62_ckdepi_difference_24m())
        }
        if (statistic == "mean_difference_change_exercise_vs_control") {
          return(mean_difference_by_arm(Trial_ID, outcome_variable, "Exercise", "Wait-list control"))
        }
        if (statistic == "paired_t_baseline_minus_post") {
          return(paired_t_baseline_minus_post(Trial_ID, "X_foam_eo_mtv_0w", outcome_variable, arm))
        }
        if (statistic == "group_curve_peak_without_cs_60_90") {
          return(group_curve_peak(Trial_ID, outcome_variable, arm, "60-90 min"))
        }
        if (statistic == "rate_per_person_year") {
          return(rate_by_arm(Trial_ID, "YP_malaria_events", "YS_study_days", arm))
        }
        if (outcome_variable %in% c(
          "trial51_hooper_sleep_post", "trial52_serum_phosphorus_23w", "trial52_bsfs_7w",
          "B04_sis_post", "B04_sis_followup", "B04_whodas_post",
          "B04_whodas_followup"
        )) {
          return(derived_value_by_arm(Trial_ID, outcome_variable, arm, statistic))
        }
        value_by_arm(Trial_ID, outcome_variable, arm, statistic)
      }
    ),
    tolerance = case_when(
      is.na(paper_precision) ~ NA_real_,
      TRUE ~ abs(paper_value) * 0.05
    ),
    absolute_diff = abs(cleaned_value - paper_value),
    status = case_when(
      is.na(paper_value) | is.na(cleaned_value) ~ "insufficient_information",
      absolute_diff <= tolerance ~ "pass",
      TRUE ~ "fail"
    ),
    notes = case_when(
      Trial_ID == "B02" & status == "fail" ~ paste0(notes, " Corrected event-code calculation still does not reproduce the paper rate within 5%."),
      Trial_ID == "B04" & status == "pass" ~ paste0(notes, " Previously archived after exact-comparison mismatch; this row is within the updated 5% tolerance."),
      Trial_ID == "54" ~ paste0(notes, " Variable-specific missingness differs from some table header counts; endpoint mean/SD are the primary reproducibility check."),
      TRUE ~ notes
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Trial_ID, outcome_variable, outcome_role, arm, statistic, paper_value, paper_precision, cleaned_value, absolute_diff, tolerance, status, paper_source, notes)

write_csv(targets, file.path(prov_dir, "outcome_reproducibility_targets.csv"))
write_csv(computed, file.path(prov_dir, "outcome_reproducibility_audit.csv"))

backup_trials = tribble(
  ~Trial_ID, ~Original_Trial_ID, ~reason, ~status, ~primary_failure_summary, ~next_action,
  "B01", 53, "insufficient publication/source information", "backup", "The paper reports baseline K-MPAI and other baseline outcomes but not exact post/change summary statistics for the cleaned primary outcome.", "Use only if a supplementary table with exact post/change K-MPAI summaries is obtained.",
  "B02", 55, "source data mismatch", "backup", "After correcting raw malaria-event coding from the old string check to numeric event code 1, cleaned rates are 0.506 and 0.243 episodes/person-year versus published 0.322 and 0.017.", "Use only if the source data documentation needed to reconstruct incident malaria exactly is found.",
  "B03", 56, "insufficient publication/source information", "backup", "The published primary outcome is sputum Gram-negative bacterial-load change, but that variable is not in the public raw files.", "Use only if the sputum bacterial-load raw file is obtained.",
  "B04", 57, "source data mismatch under exact comparison", "backup", "Raw/cleaned SIS and WHODAS arm means did not reproduce the exact published Table II primary outcome means; rows are within the updated 5% tolerance but the trial remains archived in the backup set.", "Use only if corrected source data or a documented mapping/exclusion rule is identified.",
  "B05", 58, "no associated main publication identified", "backup", "No associated main publication was identified, so no primary-outcome reproducibility audit can be completed.", "Use only if a valid main publication is identified."
)
write_csv(backup_trials, file.path(prov_dir, "backup_trials.csv"))

computed %>% count(Trial_ID, outcome_role, status)
backup_trials
```
